title: Anti-Patterns Page Rendering
description: Load anti-pattern rules, group by section, render sidebar TOC + main column cards, wrap in page shell, write to disk.
activity_flow: → readAntipatternRules(rootDir): read src/detect-antipatterns.mjs, regex-extract ANTIPATTERNS array, eval via new Function()
→ detectedRules = rules.map(r => ({ ...r, layer: DETECTION_LAYERS[r.id]||'cli', visual: VISUAL_EXAMPLES[r.id]||null }))
→ return { rules, skills, skillsByCategory, knownSkillIds, tutorials }
→ groupRulesBySection(data.rules): returns { order: string[], bySection: Record<string, Rule[]> }
→ initialize bySection with primaryOrder keys + 'General quality'
→ for each rule: assign to bySection[rule.skillSection || 'General quality']
→ sort each bucket: slop-category first, then quality; alphabetical within
→ for each section in grouped.order (skip empty):
→ for each rule in section: renderRuleCard(rule)
→ build visual block if rule.visual exists
→ return full HTML: header + legend <details> + sections
→ renderPage({ title:'Anti-patterns | Impeccable', bodyHtml, activeNav:'anti-patterns', canonicalPath:'/anti-patterns', bodyClass:'sub-page skills-layout-page anti-patterns-page' })
key_functions: generateSubPages(rootDir): async, orchestrates all sub-page builds
buildSubPageData(rootDir): async, loads rules/skills/tutorials; merges detected+llm rules
readAntipatternRules(rootDir): sync, regex-parses ANTIPATTERNS from .mjs source
groupRulesBySection(rules): sync, partitions+sorts rules into ordered section map
renderAntiPatternsSidebar(grouped): sync, returns aside HTML with anchor-jump TOC
renderAntiPatternsMain(grouped, totalRules): sync, returns main column HTML with rule cards per section
renderRuleCard(rule): sync, returns single <article class='rule-card'> HTML
wrapInDocsLayout(sidebarHtml, mainHtml): sync, wraps in skills-layout shell
renderPage(opts): sync, returns full HTML document with head/nav/body
data_sources: src/detect-antipatterns.mjs → ANTIPATTERNS array (detected rules with id, name, description, category, skillSection)
content/site/anti-patterns-catalog.js → VISUAL_EXAMPLES map (rule.id → inline HTML snippet)
branching_conditions: rule.layer !== 'llm' → counted as deterministically detected (CLI or browser)
rule.skillSection exists → render /impeccable anchor link in card
rule.visual exists → render visual preview block in card
bySection[section].length === 0 → section skipped in both sidebar and main
rule.category === 'slop' → sorted before 'quality' rules within each section
Extra sections (not in primaryOrder) → appended before 'General quality'

output.structure: Full HTML page: <aside> sidebar (anchor TOC per section) + <main> column (header + legend + section grids of rule cards)

key_relationships: renderAntiPatternsMain depends_on groupRulesBySection (section order + rule grouping)
renderAntiPatternsMain calls renderRuleCard for each rule
wrapInDocsLayout composes sidebar + main into layout shell
renderPage wraps final bodyHtml in full HTML document
important_notes: The 'tabs' in the scope description refers to the sidebar TOC whose anchor links (#section-{slug}) navigate to matching section IDs in the main column — there is no literal tab widget. The sidebar acts as section tabs for the single-page /anti-patterns index. The key elements 'nderAntiPatternsMain' and 'erPatternsWithTabs' are truncated names of renderAntiPatternsMain and renderAntiPatternsSidebar (the TOC 'tabs'). Section order is fixed: 7 primary sections + any extras from LLM rules + 'General quality' last. Within each section, 'slop' rules sort before 'quality' rules.
